expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: SDK/API visible outcomes like window title become explicit scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly includes SDK/API-visible outcomes as scenarios with observable leaves, e.g. “Create blank report — window title uses localized product string (not raw key)” with checks like “Window title is not `newReportWithApplication` (no raw i18n key)” and “Create/edit report — only one loading indicator is shown during load”. execution_notes.md also states: “SDK/API-visible outcomes are explicit scenarios/leaves: Window title correctness … Single loading indicator verification”.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is labeled “Phase 4a benchmark deliverable” and is structured as Phase 4a scenario → atomic steps → observable verification leaves (e.g., each bullet scenario has step ladders ending in specific verifications). execution_notes.md asserts Phase 4a alignment: “Output is a subcategory-only draft … with scenario → atomic steps → observable verification leaves.”
